title: (Bearish Signal) INSM enters Downtrend as Momentum indicator drops below 0 level on Mar 15, 2021
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This indicator may be signaling that INSM's price has further to drop, since it fell below its price logged 14 days ago. Traders may consider selling the stock, shorting the stock, or exploring put options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor backtested 89 similar cases where INSM's Momentum Indicator fell below the 0 level, and 73 of them led to a successful outcome. Odds of Success: 82%. Current price $35.80 crossed the support line at $36.27 and is trading between $36.27 support and $35.20 support lines. Throughout the month of 02/10/21 - 03/15/21, the price experienced a -13% Downtrend. During the week of 03/08/21 - 03/15/21, the stock fell -6%.

https://preview.redd.it/eh3iv28glfn61.png?width=1530&format=png&auto=webp&s=4842af581c81c92ce49c00b5004fdd088026df7b

**Bearish Trend Analysis**

The 10-day RSI Indicator for INSM moved out of overbought territory on January 26, 2021. This could be a bearish sign for the stock. Traders may want to consider selling the stock or buying put options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor looked at 34 similar instances where the indicator moved out of overbought territory.  Tickeron A.I. detected that in 28 of the 34 cases, the stock moved lower in the following days. This puts the odds of a move lower at 82%.

The Momentum Indicator moved below the 0 level on March 15, 2021. You may want to consider selling the stock, shorting the stock, or exploring put options on INSM as a result. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 73 of 89 cases where the Momentum Indicator fell below 0, the stock fell further within the subsequent month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 82%.

INSM moved below its 50-day Moving Average on March 15, 2021 date and that indicates a change from an upward trend to a downward trend.

The 10-day Moving Average for INSM crossed bearishly below the 50-day moving average on March 05, 2021. This indicates that the trend has shifted lower and could be considered a sell signal. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 8 of 16 past instances when the 10-day crossed below the 50-day, the stock continued to move higher over the following month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 50%.

Following a 3-day decline, the stock is projected to fall further. Considering past instances where INSM declined for three days, the price rose further in 50 of 62 cases within the following month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 77%.

[Full information about signal here](https://tickeron.com/news/9937585-insmed-insm-36-62-enters-downtrend-as-momentum-indicator-drops-below-0-level-on-mar-15-2021?utm_source=reddit&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=test&utm_content=signal)
